message:
test(workflows): add MockWezterm implementation for unit testing

Add a complete MockWezterm implementation of WeztermInterface trait
in the test module for unit testing workflow logic without requiring
a real WezTerm instance.

The MockWezterm provides:
- Default pane_info() helper for creating test PaneInfo structs
- Full implementation of all WeztermInterface methods:
  - list_panes, get_pane, get_text
  - send_text, send_text_no_paste, send_text_with_options
  - send_control, spawn, split_pane
  - focus_pane, move_pane, rename_tab
  - activate_tab, list_tabs
  - kill_pane, zoom_pane
  - circuit_status

All methods return minimal successful responses, enabling workflow
tests to run without external dependencies.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
